harness_id.description: Harness the route was requested on.

provider_family.description: Vendor/provider family a harness routes to, used for route-diversity reasoning; open-ended via "unknown".

model_hint.description: Model requested for the route; null = harness default.

provider.description: Provider actually observed; null when no evidence.

model_id.description: Model actually observed; null when no evidence.

evidence_source.description: Where the observed model/provider evidence came from: a stream event, response metadata, the model catalog, the transcript, or nowhere.

diversity_against.description: Harness ids this route was required to be diverse against.

status.description: How strongly the executed route is proven: verified (observed evidence matches the request), accepted_model_arg (the requested model arg was accepted without stream evidence), unverified, or same_model_fallback (a fallback landed on the same model).

RouteProof.description: Records requested vs observed harness/model routing, so multi-model claims cannot silently collapse onto one model.
